review_text: App crashes every time I try to open my task list. This started after the 3.0.1 update. Completely unusable now.
Can't login since the last update. It just shows a blank white screen after entering my password. iPhone 14, iOS 17.
Amazing app! It has completely changed how I manage my day. The UI is beautiful and everything works perfectly.
Please add a dark mode feature. I use this app at night and the bright screen hurts my eyes. Would love to see this added soon.
Data sync not working at all. My tasks disappear between devices. Lost important work data. This is unacceptable.
Love the new calendar integration feature! Works great. Would love to see Google Calendar sync added in a future update.
App is extremely slow. Takes 10+ seconds to load on my Samsung Galaxy S21. Other apps work fine. Very frustrating.

Best productivity app on the market. I've tried dozens and this one is by far the most intuitive. Keep up the great work!
Missing functionality for recurring tasks. I have to manually re-create weekly tasks every single week. Very tedious.
The app deleted all my projects after I updated it. I had months of work in there. Extremely serious data loss bug!
Would love to see a Pomodoro timer built into the app. Right now I have to switch between two apps. Please add this!

Too expensive for what it offers. The premium plan is $15/month which is way too much. Competitors offer the same for $5.
Works perfectly on my Pixel 7. Fast, responsive, and reliable. The offline mode is especially impressive.
Notifications completely broken after update. I'm missing all my task reminders. This defeats the whole purpose of the app.
Please add collaboration features so I can share task lists with my team. Right now it feels too solo-focused.
Poor customer service. I emailed support 2 weeks ago about my subscription being double-charged and got zero response.
App crashes on startup on Android 14. Tried reinstalling 3 times. Still broken. OnePlus 11 device.
Just discovered the subtask feature and it's a game changer. This app keeps getting better and better. 10/10!
